autoStart.description: Start the timer immediately on mount.

countUp.description: Count up from 0 to duration instead of counting down.

color.description: Static color for the progress indicator. Accepts semantic names or any CSS color.

colorThresholds.description: Array of { at: number (%), color } breakpoints for auto color-shifting.

segmentCount.description: Number of segments for the segmented variant.

showControls.description: Show the built-in pause and reset buttons.

pauseOnHover.description: Automatically pause when the user hovers over the timer.

disabled.description: Disable the timer — no interaction, shows disabled badge.

pulseWhenRunning.description: Apply a subtle pulse animation to the time display while running.

announceInterval.description: Announce the remaining time via aria-live region every N seconds (e.g. 60 for once-per-minute).

announceFinalSeconds.description: When remaining seconds drops to or below this value, announce every second via aria-live (e.g. 10 for the final ten-second countdown).

announceOnComplete.description: Announce 'Timer complete' via aria-live region when the timer reaches zero.

announcePoliteness.description: aria-live politeness for the announcement region.

criticalThreshold.description: Fire onCriticalThreshold once when remaining seconds first drops to or below this value.

onCriticalThreshold.description: Called the first time remaining time crosses criticalThreshold (resets on reset/restart).

onComplete.description: Called when the timer reaches zero (or duration in count-up mode).

onTick.description: Called every second with remaining and elapsed values.

onPause.description: Called when the timer is paused.

onReset.description: Called when the timer is reset.

start().description: Start the timer if not already running.

reset().description: Reset to initial value. Restarts automatically if autoStart is true.
